name: image-studio
description: Local-first modular image generation studio for OpenAI-compatible image APIs.

scripts.registry:generate: node scripts/generate-provider-registry.mjs && node scripts/generate-generation-param-registry.mjs && node scripts/generate-extension-registries.mjs && node scripts/generate-storage-migration-registry.mjs
scripts.registry:check: node scripts/generate-provider-registry.mjs --check && node scripts/generate-generation-param-registry.mjs --check && node scripts/generate-extension-registries.mjs --check && node scripts/generate-storage-migration-registry.mjs --check
scripts.verify:static: npm run arch:check:strict && npm run imports:check && npm run interface:check && npm run params:check && npm run providers:check && npm run registry:check && npm run tasks:check && npm run storage:check && npm run css:check && npm run motion:check && npm run ui:check && npm run debt:check && npm run secrets:check && npm test && npm run build
scripts.verify:visual: npm run capture:screenshots -- --viewports=desktop,mobile --scenarios=gallery,composer-compact,composer-long-prompt,composer-attachments,composer-controls,gallery-quick-actions,sidebar-collapsed,settings-api,settings-models,settings-integrations,detail,attachment-preview-modal,batch-composer,info,parameters --out=artifacts/verify-visual && npm run visual:check
scripts.verify:all: npm run verify:static && npm run verify:visual
scripts.release:check: npm run verify:static && npm run debt:check:strict && npm run storage:audit:strict
scripts.release:full: npm run release:check && npm run release:visual
